name: Labels/tags
description: Board-scoped label sets, multiple labels per card. Card face shows colored chips. Filtering by label dims non-matching cards (non-destructive, preserves spatial context).

name: Frontend checkbox UI + CSS
description: SVG checkbox in board page card component, toggle function, hover reveal CSS, title dimming at 0.6 opacity on completed state.
result: Checkbox UI with hover reveal and title dimming implemented.

name: Centralized error handler + logger redaction
description: setErrorHandler in app.ts returning 500; Pino config with redaction of auth/cookie headers and LOG_LEVEL env var.
result: Error handler and Pino logger with redaction configured.

commit.message: feat: complete testing gap coverage and API best practices hardening

name: Wire api() to push errors to store before rethrowing
description: Modify packages/web/src/lib/api.ts: wrap fetch in try/catch to capture network errors (status: null, code: NETWORK_ERROR). Push to errorStore before throwing ApiError on non-ok responses. api() still throws the same errors — no behavioral change to callers.

name: Error store (errorStore.svelte.ts)
description: New file packages/web/src/lib/errorStore.svelte.ts. Svelte 5 runes state holding ErrorEntry[]. add() prepends with UUID+timestamp, caps at 50 entries. clear() empties. Registers window unhandledrejection listener on first browser import.

name: Global Error Indicator
description: Add a unified error indicator in the nav bar so any failed API request is visible immediately without per-call-site changes. A Svelte 5 runes store holds up to 50 recent errors; api() pushes every failure before rethrowing; a red badge with count appears in the header nav. Clicking opens a dropdown listing recent failures with method, path, status, and message. No auto-clear — user clicks 'Clear all'. Unhandled rejection fallback via window.addEventListener.

name: Card covers on/off
description: Board-level toggle to disable card cover images for a denser view.

name: Web: background picker in board settings (color tab + gradient swatches)
description: Add Background section to board settings UI. Two tabs: Color (native input[type=color] + Reset button) and Gradient (10 swatches grid with checkmark on selected). Save calls PATCH /boards/:id with optimistic update.

name: Web: apply board background to board page container
description: Derive CSS background string from board.backgroundType + board.backgroundValue using shared preset list. Apply inline style to board container. List columns use rgba(255,255,255,0.88) + backdrop-filter blur only when backgroundType is set.

name: Members/assignments
description: Assign cards to users, show avatars on card face.

name: COOKIE_SECURE flag + SQLite error matching
description: Replace NODE_ENV==='production' with COOKIE_SECURE boolean env; match SQLite errors by .code === 'SQLITE_CONSTRAINT_UNIQUE'.
result: COOKIE_SECURE env and robust SQLite error matching in place.

commit.message: feat: complete testing gap coverage and API best practices hardening

name: Board Background (Color + Gradient Presets)
description: Add per-board background setting with two modes: solid color (hex) or one of 10 curated gradient presets. Storage: background_type ('color'|'gradient'|null) and background_value columns on boards table. Preset source of truth in @kanbang/shared as BACKGROUND_GRADIENT_PRESETS. List columns get semi-transparent white bg with backdrop blur when a board background is active. Null means app default (no backfill on existing boards).

name: Project Rename: Trailo → KanBang
description: Rename the entire project from Trailo to KanBang across the codebase: package scopes, cookie names, database files, UI text, Docker/deploy config, and documentation. Machine name 'kanbang' chosen to avoid special-character incompatibilities in HTTP headers, npm, and shell.
result: Full project renamed from Trailo to KanBang. Machine name 'kanbang' used throughout; display name 'KanBang' in UI. Cookie renamed (invalidating existing sessions, acceptable for personal app). All tests pass after rename.

name: Package names, scope, and lockfile
description: Update package.json scope, pnpm workspace names, regenerate lockfile.
result: Package names and scope renamed from trailo to kanbang.

name: API Spec Update & Claude Tool Readiness
description: Update REST API spec to match current implementation (add completed field, fix passkey paths, missing endpoints, health). Add three new endpoints to make the API useful as a Claude tool: GET single card, GET single list with sorted cards, and board-scoped card search with text/completion filters. Search returns listName in results.
result: Spec corrected and three new routes added. GET /cards/:cardId (3 tests), GET /lists/:listId (4 tests), GET /boards/:boardId/cards/search (8 tests). All 136 tests pass. Implementation in f6a40a2, tests in bc49398.

commit.message: feat: add GET card, GET list, and card search endpoints for tool readiness

name: Copy/move card
description: Copy or move cards between lists or boards. Copy dialog with checkboxes to keep checklists/attachments/comments.

name: Web Proxy Hardening
description: Harden hooks.server.ts: (1) Header allowlist on the API proxy — only forward cookie, content-type, accept, accept-language; drop x-forwarded-*, authorization, host, origin, referer. (2) Cache /auth/me per session cookie with 30s TTL using module-level Map to avoid a backend round-trip on every sub-request. (3) Invalidate cache on successful POST /auth/logout. Addresses security review findings #1 and #2.

name: API Best Practices Hardening
description: Harden the Fastify API against common Node.js issues: graceful shutdown (10s grace via close-with-grace), Zod env validation at startup (process.exit on bad config), COOKIE_SECURE boolean env var replacing NODE_ENV checks, centralized error handler returning generic 500s, Pino logger with header redaction, and robust SQLite UNIQUE constraint matching by .code instead of message string.
result: All six API hardening improvements implemented in a single commit alongside testing improvements. Zod validates env config at startup; graceful shutdown handles SIGTERM/SIGINT; error handler logs and returns standardized responses; logger redacts sensitive headers; SQLite errors matched by code. All 145 tests pass.

commit.message: feat: complete testing gap coverage and API best practices hardening

name: GET /cards/:cardId and GET /lists/:listId routes
description: New routes with ownership verification. ListService.getById with sorted cards. Integration tests: 404, ownership isolation.
result: GET card and GET list routes implemented with ownership checks and tests.

Frontend api() gets injectable fetchFn for testability.

name: DB migration: backgroundType and backgroundValue columns on boards
description: Add backgroundType text('background_type', {enum:['color','gradient']}) and backgroundValue text('background_value') to boards schema. Run pnpm db:generate then pnpm db:migrate.

name: Table/spreadsheet view
description: Flat list of all cards across lists.

description: Trigger/action pairs (e.g. when card moves to Done, mark all checklist items complete; when due date is tomorrow, add label Urgent).

description: Summary stats (cards per list, overdue count, etc.).

name: In-memory /auth/me cache with 30s TTL
description: Add module-level Map<sessionCookie, {user, expiresAt}> in hooks.server.ts. resolveUser() checks cache, fetches on miss/expiry. Failures fall through to locals.user=null and are NOT cached.

name: Required fields
description: Enforce that cards in certain lists must have due date, assignee, or label before they can be moved.

name: Card 'Completed' Checkbox
description: Add a boolean completed field to cards with a square checkbox UI. Checkbox is hidden by default, revealed on card hover when unchecked; always visible when checked. Completed card titles are dimmed to 0.6 opacity. Prerequisite for the Done column auto-move feature.
result: Completed checkbox added to cards with hover-reveal UI, title dimming, and full test coverage. The completed field became the foundation for the Done column's auto-move feature.
